case_title: ROBERT ESCOBAR VS. ROADSHOW SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT ROADSHOW SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
